name: Honey- Mustard Turkey Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup reduced fat Ritz crackers, crushed
1/2 cup mozzarella cheese, part-skim milk shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the turkey, egg, cracker crumbs, cheese, onion, ginger, and three tablespoons mustard. Form into 30 balls, about one inch each.
2. Place the meatballs in a greased 13-inch X 9-inch X 2-inch baking dish.
3. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 20 - 25 minutes or until juices run clear.
4. In a saucepan, combine pineapple juice, green pepper, honey, cornstarch, and onion powder; bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
5. Cook and stir for 2 more minutes; reduce heat.
6. Stir in the remaining mustard until smooth.
7. Brush meatballs with about one-quarter cup sauce and return to the oven for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Serve the remaining sauce as a dip for the meatballs.
Serving Size: 3 meatballs
Calories: 176, Total Fat: 8gm, Calories from Fat: 40%, Saturated Fat: 2gm, Cholesterol: 48mg, Sodium: 337mg, Carbohydrate: 14gm, Protein: 11gm
